message:
feat(fcp-core): add enforcement registration, health aggregation tests, and CredentialBackend trait [z1nkz.2]

Migrates three FCP3 Transition Scorecard items to fcp-core:
- Register enforcement module (EnforcementCheckOrder, 11-stage pipeline)
- Add 20 health aggregation tests (AggregateHealthState, CompositeHealthSnapshot)
- Add CredentialBackend async trait with zone-scoped CRUD + 8 error tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
